fields.text: What is the difference between monolithic and microservices architecture?
Explain the role of an API gateway in backend systems.
What are common HTTP methods and when are they used?
How do you optimize database queries for performance?
What is connection pooling and why is it useful?
Explain REST vs GraphQL APIs.
What strategies do you use for caching in backend systems?
How does authentication differ from authorization?
Explain eventual consistency in distributed systems.
What are common backend scalability challenges?
What is the difference between supervised and unsupervised learning?
Explain overfitting and underfitting in ML models.
What are common feature selection techniques?
How do you handle missing data in datasets?
Explain precision, recall, and F1-score.
What is the difference between bagging and boosting?
How does gradient descent work?
What is regularization and why is it important?
Explain the bias-variance tradeoff.
How do you evaluate the performance of a clustering algorithm?
What is the difference between continuous integration and continuous deployment?
Explain the concept of Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
How does Docker differ from virtual machines?
What are Kubernetes pods and deployments?
How do you monitor system performance in production?
What is load balancing and why is it important?
How do you implement zero-downtime deployments?
What are common security practices in DevOps?
Explain the use of CI/CD pipelines.
How do you handle logging and alerting?
What is the difference between HTML, CSS, and JavaScript?
Explain how the virtual DOM works in React.
What are React hooks and when would you use them?
How do you optimize performance in large React apps?
What is responsive design and how do you implement it?
Explain CSS flexbox and grid systems.
What are common differences between client-side and server-side rendering?
How do you handle state management in frontend apps?
What are web accessibility best practices?
Explain the concept of progressive web apps (PWA).
